name: South Shore Grill
tagline: Monsarrat Ave local favorite near Diamond Head — killer fish tacos, burgers, and acai bowls in a no-frills neighborhood joint.
mustOrder: fish tacos — the signature, perfectly battered
acai bowl for a post-hike refuel
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave; easier on weekdays
bestTime: Perfect post-Diamond Head lunch. Hit the trail early, then refuel here by 11am before the lunch rush
talkStory: South Shore Grill is the neighborhood restaurant Monsarrat Ave deserves — family-owned, consistent, and zero pretense. The fish tacos are the star, with perfectly battered fresh catch in soft flour tortillas. The garlic shrimp plate rivals the North Shore trucks without the 45-minute drive. Located on the same Monsarrat strip as Diamond Head Market & Grill, Bogart's Café, and Monsarrat Shave Ice, it's part of the best post-hike food corridor on the island. Mostly a local crowd with some savvy tourists. BYOB-friendly (there's a liquor store nearby).
